exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your spiritual awakening forward
items: Create a dedicated sacred space in your home for daily spiritual practice
Research and read one foundational spiritual text that resonates with your current beliefs
Define and write down your personal understanding of spirituality and what awakening means to you
Find and connect with one spiritual teacher, mentor, or guide through online courses, local groups, or recommended teachers
Establish a daily spiritual practice routine that includes at least 10 minutes of meditation or mindfulness
Create a beginner-friendly spiritual reading list and schedule time to study one foundational concept each week
